overall_explanation: The patch correctly converts /llms from SSR to a prerendered static page and moves the private token-burn fetch to post-paint client hydration via a new ?view=full parameter on the existing API route. The API change correctly parses the view param server-side, routing to the appropriate fetch function with the same 600 s cache for both variants. No secrets or private URLs are exposed to the browser. The hydrate.ts module correctly uses the astro:page-load event for Astro view-transitions compatibility, and the data-llms-hydrated guard prevents double-hydration on the same DOM while allowing re-hydration after navigation-triggered DOM replacement. The try/catch in hydrateLlmsPage (lines 465–483) correctly calls renderUnavailable on both thrown errors and ok:false responses, so the error state is properly surfaced. The static HTML shells and data-attribute scaffolding in llms.astro correctly map to the selectors queried by the hydrator. No actionable defects are introduced by this change.
